sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: RECENT CHANGES page (system:recent-changes) is now recognised and enhanced: inserts #bb-sticky-bar with a '⊞ Table View' button that collects the 200 most recent changes (10 pages via pager clicks, MutationObserver on #site-changes-list) and renders them in a sortable/filterable SmartTable (columns: Page, Type, Date, Rev, By, Comment, Link).

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: RETAIL page tag checks: computeExpectedRetailTags now parses the <div class="code"><pre><code> metadata block for a 'Commercially Released: Month DD, YYYY' line and adds the lowercase month name, day-of-month (no leading zero), and year to the expected tag set. isManagedRetailTag extended to cover month names, 4-digit years, and day-of-month numbers so spurious date tags are also flagged.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: VENUE pages (/venue:…) are now recognised and processed: adds #bb-btn-container with ⇄ Original Page, 💾 Save, 📂 Load buttons; annotates .page-tags inline with the same gold warning box and missing/spurious tag treatment already applied on DETAIL pages (using computeExpectedVenueTags / isManagedVenueTag).

RETAIL pages (/retail:…) are now recognised and processed: same button container and inline tag annotation (new computeExpectedRetailTags / isManagedRetailTag / annotateRetailPageTags). Expected tags: 'retail' + first-letter index tag.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR page: when a section's .bb-section-processed div opens with a banner/header <table> (e.g. a tour-leg announcement), that table is now hoisted to appear before the .bb-section-controls toggle buttons instead of after them. The table is also stripped from the original-view snapshot (.bb-section-original) to prevent it rendering twice. All filter/mismatch backward-walks and the restart cleanup updated accordingly.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add event text filter bar on YEAR, LIST, and HOME pages (rendered below #bb-controls in the sticky bar).
Filter bar layout: [count] [input field ×] [Cc] [Rx] [Ex] | [Ev] — all checkboxes have tooltips.
Cc: case-sensitive matching; Rx: RegExp mode (invalid regex silently matches nothing); Ex: exclude mode (show non-matches, highlighting disabled); Ev: full-event-content search.
Escape key in focused input: first press clears query, second press blurs the field.

In Ev mode, all occurrences across the full .bb-section-processed div are highlighted (event name, setlist, button labels) using text-node walking — no innerHTML manipulation, event listeners preserved.
In default mode only the event name link is highlighted; additionally highlights .bb-event-type and .bb-event-alias sibling spans when matched.
On LIST pages the <em> event-type suffix (e.g. '(Rehearsal)') is included in filter matching and highlighted when matched.
Text filter and mismatch toggle are fully composable — single DOM pass, event visible only when it passes both filters.
Text filter query and options are preserved across YEAR page re-runs (▶ Start); mismatch toggle state resets on each run.
Text filter query is preserved across HOME page re-fetches; mismatch state resets on each fetch.

Non-Ev filter matching on YEAR/HOME pages includes .bb-event-type and .bb-event-alias sibling spans (searching 'rehearsal' or an alias name works without Ev mode); Ev mode uses full processedDiv.textContent.
Filter count display: larger bold font, tooltip 'Visible events / total events on this page'; filter input wrap enlarged (padding 3px 7px, width 22em).
Extracted shared predicates isYearMismatch() and isListMismatch(); setupMismatchFilter() and setupListMismatchFilter() accept optional state/applyFn params for composable filtering.
setupStickyBar() now returns the stickyBar element.
Added doc/FILTERING.md architecture reference; added entry to CLAUDE.md quick reference table.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR page: all .list-pages-box widgets are now removed from #bb-pre-events inside setupStickyBar, covering any box that does not carry 'most recent' text and would therefore have survived the earlier hideJumpToRecentBox filter.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR page: the 'Jump to most recent' .list-pages-box is now removed (not just hidden) from #page-content before it is moved into #bb-pre-events, so it no longer appears in the sticky header band.

DETAIL page toggle: clicking '⇄ Original Page' now also hides all script-added annotation artefacts outside the setlist tab — .bb-glyph, .bb-anchor-match, .bb-anchor-warn, .bb-venue-warn, .bb-tag-missing, .bb-tag-spurious, .bb-icon-sorry, and the Setlist tab label decoration (.bb-setlist-tab-ann / .bb-setlist-tab-match). Implemented via a bb-original-view body class toggled in insertDetailToggle; annotateSetlistTab now uses a <span class="bb-setlist-tab-ann"> wrapper for the warning glyph and bb-setlist-tab-match CSS class (instead of inline style) for the green match state so both can be cleanly reverted by CSS.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: List view: duplicate song numbers no longer appear. buildListDiv now strips any a.bb-song-num and span.bb-song-num-plain elements injected by renderSetlistElement (v2.02 flat-view numbers) from the li.innerHTML before prepending its own list-view number.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: LiveDL icon panel: paragraphs containing /retail: links are now stripped from the 'Official Live Download' panel content. That information is already shown under the dedicated Retail icon. Applied in extractRecordingContent for both the hr-split path and the no-split (full-tab) path.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Retail icon panel: YUI tab content (e.g. 'Released', 'Additional Information' sections on retail pages) was missing because buildRetailContent stripped both ul.yui-nav and div.yui-content. Fixed by flattening each .yui-navset into a div.bb-retail-tabs with tab labels rendered as bb-retail-tab-label <strong> headings and all panels visible (display:none cleared).
Retail icon panel: wikidot footer (disclaimer + social-media links) is now removed from the rendered retail page content. The <hr> immediately preceding the footer is also stripped.
Retail icon panel: <script> tags are removed from the cloned retail page content.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items:
YEAR page: Retail icon is now clickable. wireRetailIcon() scans the Recording tab of the DETAIL page for

elements containing /retail: links. If none are found, the icon is dimmed and a ⚠️ warning is appended (same bb-icon-sorry pattern as other icon warnings). When retail references exist, clicking the icon lazily fetches each referenced /retail: page, strips its

    and
    containers, and shows a panel (via buildIconPanel) that combines the reference paragraph(s) from the Recording tab with the retail page body content. Multiple retail hrefs within one event each get a separate section in the panel.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR page flat view: song numbers (a.bb-song-num / span.bb-song-num-plain) are now rendered before each song in the regular ' / ' separated paragraph view, matching the list view. Clicking a number in the flat view fetches and toggles the same .bb-song-tab-row as in the list view — both share the section._bbSongRows cache so the loaded state is consistent regardless of which view triggered the fetch.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: YEAR page List view: each song entry now shows a clickable number (a.bb-song-num) instead of a plain CSS counter. Clicking the number fetches the corresponding SONG page and appends a .bb-song-tab-row (labeled with the song name) after the venue tab row. Each non-empty song page tab gets a button; clicking toggles an inline panel. Clicking the same number a second time hides the row; clicking again shows it.

YEAR page List view — Song Tags button: each song tab row ends with a 'Tags' button showing the song page's .page-tags with consistency checks: 'song' (always expected), the first letter of the song name lowercased, and 'lyricsheet' (when Gallery tab contains lyricsheet images). Missing tags shown in bold red; spurious managed tags flagged with an orange ⚠️.

YEAR page List view: songs without a /song: URL (year-only mismatches, medley entries without individual pages) get a non-clickable grey number (span.bb-song-num-plain). Multiple songs can each have their own loaded row simultaneously; each row is labeled with its song name.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR page: venue tab row is no longer green-tinted — both the event and venue tab rows now share the same button style. Instead, each row is prefixed with a fixed-width italic label ('Event:' / 'Venue:') so the button columns align vertically.

YEAR page: a shared .bb-tab-row-label span and makeTabRowLabel() helper implement the label prefix. The guard for appending empty rows now correctly accounts for the label always being present as the first child.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: YEAR page: each event now shows a venue tab row (.bb-venue-tab-row, green-tinted) below the event tab row. Buttons open inline panels for each non-empty tab on the referenced venue page (e.g. 'Performances', 'Cancelled', 'Gallery'). The venue page is fetched once (same request already used for the venue name check) so there is no additional network cost.

YEAR page: a 'Tags' button in the venue tab row shows the venue page's .page-tags with consistency checks: 'venue' tag and the first-letter index tag (e.g. 'b' for 'Blue Cross Arena…') are always expected. Missing tags are shown in bold red; managed tags present without a matching condition are flagged with an orange ⚠️.
YEAR page: the event tab row is renamed from bb-extra-tab-row to bb-event-tab-row (and buttons from bb-extra-tab-btn to bb-event-tab-btn) to distinguish it from the new venue row.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Year mismatch checks now accept range slugs: events on the '1949-64' / '1949-64-list' pages whose date falls anywhere in 1949–1964 no longer trigger a false '⚠️ Year mismatch' warning. Applies to all three check sites (YEAR page event anchors, DETAIL page 'Info & Setlist' anchor, LIST page event links).

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: HOME page: 'Fetch All Gig Pages' renamed to '▶ Fetch All Year Pages' and 'Fetch All Gig-Overview Pages' renamed to '▶ Fetch All Year-List Pages'. Both are now toggle buttons — clicking while active stops the fetch (showing '⏹ Stop Year Pages' / '⏹ Stop Year-List Pages'). The separate 'Stop fetching' button is removed.
YEAR page: button order changed to Start | Save | Load | Original Page | Mismatches | Table View.
YEAR page: SmartTable trigger button now has a descriptive tooltip.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR page: clicking ▶ Start multiple times (after a mid-run stop) no longer produces duplicate glyphs and annotations. The DOM is now restored to its original state before each new processing run.
nogig events on YEAR pages: the venue block now renders as 'No gig at Venue ✅/⚠️' instead of the bare 'at Venue' shown for regular gig events.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: LIST and DETAIL pages auto-process on load (▶ Start button removed from both); ▶ Start / ⏹ Stop is kept only on YEAR pages where multi-minute processing makes it useful.
💾 Save filename now uses the page title: 'bb-YEAR-2026.json', 'bb-DETAIL-2022-01-21 Transparent Clinch Gallery, Asbury Park, NJ.json', etc.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Added ▶ Start / ⏹ Stop toggle button to YEAR and LIST pages; ▶ Start / ✓ Done button on DETAIL pages. Pages no longer auto-process on load — use ▶ Start to process or 📂 Load to restore from cache.
YEAR processing can be stopped mid-run; partial results remain visible and ▶ Start re-enables for a restart.
LIST processing can be stopped after the YEAR page fetch completes; ▶ Start re-enables for a restart.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fixed: after loading from cache and clicking ⟳ retry, icon images were unresponsive. The icon-title lookup in wireIconHandlers now strips the '— click to expand' suffix that was appended during the original processing run, so ICON_TITLE_MAP resolves correctly on retry.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Added descriptive tooltips to all buttons in #bb-btn-container (YEAR, HOME, LIST, DETAIL pages), per-event .bb-section-controls (⇄ Original, ☰ List), and .bb-extra-tab-row (tab content buttons and Tags button).
List view (☰ List): synthesized section labels 'Show:' and 'Recordings:' are now rendered in italic using the bb-section-label class, consistent with explicit labels.
List view (☰ List): 'Recording:' label renamed to 'Recordings:' for consistency with Brucebase terminology.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Added 💾 Save and 📂 Load buttons to all page types (YEAR, HOME, LIST, DETAIL). Save downloads the fully-processed DOM as a JSON cache file; Load restores it instantly without re-fetching.
After loading from cache, song diff tooltips, error/warn tooltips, per-section ⇄ Original / ☰ List toggles, global ⇄ Original Page, and ⚡ Mismatches filter are all re-wired automatically.
Icon panels and extra-tab buttons that require live DETAIL page data are dimmed after a cache load; a per-event ⟳ retry button refetches just that event's DETAIL page on demand to restore them.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: YEAR page: recording-type events now show 'Recording session at Venue Name' in the venue info block instead of just 'at Venue Name'.
List view (☰ List): unlabeled setlist sections now always show an explicit 'Show:' label; blockquote-based recording sections show 'Recording:'.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: List view (☰ List button): a blank line is now rendered before the song list content.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Venue name comparison now uses the raw (non-normalized, non-uppercased) venue part from the DETAIL event name, matching the Title Case of the VENUE page title.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: DETAIL page: the 'Venue' link now gets a ✅ or ⚠️ glyph (with tooltip) comparing the VENUE page title against the venue part of the DETAIL event name.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Venue name in the YEAR page scheduled block is now rendered at 1.1em (slightly larger than the surrounding timing text).

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: YEAR page: after fetching the DETAIL page, follows the Venue link to the VENUE page and appends the venue name (bold italic, hyperlinked) to the Scheduled timing block — or to a new styled line when no timing info exists — so the entry reads 'Scheduled: … at Venue Name'.
YEAR page: venue name from the VENUE page is compared against the venue part of the DETAIL event name; a ✅ or ⚠️ glyph (with hover tooltip) is rendered after the venue link.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: bb-scheduled font size increased from 0.8em to 0.9em for better legibility.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Tags panel: added 'setlist' expected tag (any setlist image in News/Memorabilia tab); 'handwritten' and 'printed' are now detected from image filenames (/handwritten/i and /printed/i) instead of treating all setlist images as handwritten.
Tags panel: added 'soundcheck' expected tag when the detail page content contains a 'Soundcheck:' section label.

Tags panel: added 'livedl' expected tag when the Recording tab contains an official live download entry (detected via isLiveDLSplit). 'bootleg' is now only expected when Recording content is NOT purely a LiveDL (or when both sections exist separated by an hr).
Tags panel: added 'storyteller' expected tag when the Storyteller tab has non-Sorry content.

Tags panel: spurious tag detection — if a managed tag (date-based, event-type, or content-based) exists on the page but its expected condition is NOT met, the tag link is annotated with an orange ⚠️ tooltip in the YEAR page panel and a hover-tooltip span on the DETAIL page. Button label turns dark-orange when only spurious issues are present (red if any missing tags).
New isManagedTag() and spuriousTagMsg() helpers; MANAGED_CONTENT_TAGS and SPURIOUS_TAG_REASONS constants added.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Tags panel: zero-padded day numbers (e.g. tag '07') no longer false-positive as missing when the expected day is '7'. New isTagPresent() helper accepts both padded and stripped forms for purely numeric tags.

Tags panel: 'Missing expected tags:' header is now rendered as a

element before the

    , not as a
  1. inside the ordered list.
Tags panel: missing expected tags are now inserted at their correct alphabetical position within the merged sorted tag list instead of being appended at the end.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: YEAR pages: each processed event entry now has a 'Tags' button (last in the bb-extra-tab-row) that opens a panel showing all DETAIL page tags as hyperlinks. If expected tags are missing, the button label turns red with a count (e.g. 'Tags ⚠️ (2)') and missing tags appear in bold red inside the panel.

DETAIL pages: after processing, the page-tags container is inspected for expected tags derived from the event date (year, month name, day, weekday), event type (gig/recording/etc.), and tab content (bootleg if Recording tab has content; news/memorabilia if News or News/Memorabilia tab has content; ticket if ticket images present; handwritten if setlist images present). Missing tags are highlighted in bold red text added to the tag container, which is also surrounded by a bold yellow warning box.
New computeExpectedTags() helper centralises the expected-tag logic and is shared by both YEAR and DETAIL page annotation paths.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: DETAIL pages: 'Info & Setlist' link now shows a ✅ glyph (with tooltip) when all anchor checks pass — anchor matches YEAR page, date-derived anchor matches, and href year matches event date year. Previously only ⚠️ was shown on failure; success was silent.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: YEAR pages: event-name tooltip now shows 'Event anchor: #XXXXXX' immediately after 'Event type:' so the anchor can be inspected without leaving the page.

YEAR pages: checkYearAnchorConsistency now also runs a DateToAnchor check (DDMMYY derived from the event date) against the YEAR page anchor, and a year check (4-digit year in the DETAIL 'Info & Setlist' href vs the event date year). All issues are reported in the existing ⚠️ anchor-warn span on the YEAR page.

DETAIL pages: the 'Info & Setlist' / 'Info' anchor check now also compares the DateToAnchor value and the 4-digit year in the href path against the event date. Issues are reported in the existing ⚠️ anchor-warn span appended after the link.

LIST/YEAR OVERVIEW pages: processOneListEvent now detects (a) year mismatch (4-digit year in href path ≠ 4-digit year in event date) and (b) date-derived anchor mismatch (DateToAnchor of event date ≠ anchor in href). Cross-year hrefs (href year ≠ list-page year) receive an immediate ⚠️ warning. Same-year hrefs with date/anchor issues get a ⚠️ span appended after the existing ✅/❌ glyph. extractListPageEvents no longer filters out cross-year hrefs and now exposes hrefYear in each event record.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: findInfoSetlistLink already matched links with text 'Info' (not just 'Info & Setlist') via /info/i — confirmed no change needed.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: HOME / Mismatches filter: when active, entire year sections (h3 header + bb-year-wrapper) are now hidden when they contain no mismatches. For Gig-Overview fetches this is evaluated per wrapper using the bb-glyph sibling of each list link; for Gig-Pages fetches it is evaluated per wrapper using the same .bb-section-processed / .bb-glyph selector logic as applyMismatchFilter. Deactivating the filter restores all headers and wrappers regardless of mode.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: HOME / Fetch All Gig-Overview Pages: h1 section headers (e.g. '1949-1964 listing by date / location') and hr dividers are now stripped from each fetched list-page wrapper by stripYearWrapperNoise, eliminating the repeated noise after each YEAR OVERVIEW block.

HOME / Fetch All Gig-Overview Pages: removed the erroneous wrapYearSections() call from fetchAndProcessListPage; this was creating empty .bb-section-processed divs and duplicate hr elements visible in the rendered output.

HOME / Mismatches button: now works for both fetch modes. For Gig-Overview fetches it filters li rows by bb-glyph (✅ hides, ❌/⚠️/❓ keeps), mirroring the YEAR OVERVIEW page logic. For Gig-Pages fetches it delegates to applyMismatchFilter. Both modes show the count in the label ('⚡ Mismatches (N)') and toggle to '⚡ All Events (total)'. The mismatch state is rebuilt on each fetch and torn down at the start of the next.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: HOME / Table View: replaced custom buildHomePageTable with SmartTable (same approach as YEAR and YEAR OVERVIEW pages). Columns: Year (number), Date (date), Status (glyph), Event (string), Link. The SmartTable trigger button is inserted into #bb-btn-container before the Mismatches button, replacing the old static '⊞ Table View' button. extractHomeSmartTableRows strips the YYYY-MM-DD prefix from event names so the Date column is not duplicated. HOME_SMARTTABLE_COLUMNS added as a top-level const alongside LIST_SMARTTABLE_COLUMNS.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR OVERVIEW pages: 'Original Page' and 'Mismatches' buttons were permanently disabled and 'Table View' was missing. Root cause: LIST_SMARTTABLE_COLUMNS was declared as a const after the top-level dispatch that calls runListPage, putting it in the temporal dead zone when runListPage referenced it inside SmartTable.render(). The ReferenceError halted execution before the button-enable lines. Fix: move LIST_SMARTTABLE_COLUMNS to the top of the IIFE alongside the other shared constants, before the dispatch.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR OVERVIEW pages: '⊞ Table View' now uses the SmartTable library (same as YEAR pages) instead of the custom buildListPageTable. Columns: Date (sortable/filterable date), Status (glyph), Event (string), Link. Rows are extracted after processOneListEvent runs so glyph values are already present. The SmartTable trigger button is moved into #bb-btn-container alongside '⇄ Original Page' and '⚡ Mismatches'. The tri-state setListView / listTableEl / viewState machinery and buildListPageTable have been removed.
YEAR OVERVIEW pages: Original Page toggle now delegates to setupGlobalToggle (same helper used by YEAR pages) instead of inline tri-state logic.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: YEAR OVERVIEW pages: runListPage now builds a sticky control bar (same #bb-sticky-bar / #bb-controls / #bb-btn-container structure as YEAR pages) that replaces and hides the page-title div. The bar contains three buttons: '⇄ Original Page', '⚡ Mismatches (N)', '⊞ Table View', plus the timer/progress indicator.

YEAR OVERVIEW pages: '⇄ Original Page' and '⊞ Table View' share a tri-state view (list/original/table) via setListView(v) so switching views never leaves content in an inconsistent hidden state. Note: setupStickyBar is intentionally NOT used here because on list pages events may sit before the first <hr>, so moving pre-<hr> content would swallow event rows.

YEAR OVERVIEW pages: '⚡ Mismatches' filter (setupListMismatchFilter) hides matching events (✅ glyph) and shows only mismatches; counts are embedded in the label. Hides the closest li/tr ancestor or parentNode of each event link.

YEAR OVERVIEW pages: '⊞ Table View' builds a two-column Date / Event table via buildListPageTable — splits event link text on leading YYYY-MM-DD, clones the glyph span into the Event cell, and opens links in a new tab.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: @include: add (-list)? to 1949-64 pattern so the 1949-64-list overview page is matched. isListPage regex updated to /^(\d{4}|1949-64)-list$/ and LIST_LINK_RE updated to /\/((?:\d{4}|1949-64))#.../ to handle 1949-64 anchors.

HOME / Gig-Overview fetch: fetched list pages now receive match/mismatch glyphs. fetchAndProcessYear branches on slug.endsWith('-list') — list pages call fetchAndProcessListPage(year, container, onProgress) which runs wrapYearSections then the extractListPageEvents → buildAnchorToNameMap → processOneListEvent pipeline (same as direct runListPage). extractListPageEvents gains an optional container param (defaults to #page-content for direct-page use).

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: HOME page: added '⊞ Table View' button. After fetching, clicking it builds an aggregated <table> (Year / Date / Status / Event columns) from all loaded bb-year-wrapper divs — supports both full year and list-page wrappers. The button toggles between the table and the normal event list; the table is rebuilt from scratch on each new fetch run.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: HOME page / Gig-Overview fetch: stripYearWrapperNoise now takes isListPage flag. For -list pages the bulk pre-<hr> sweep is skipped (events on overview pages live before or between <hr> elements and were being wiped). Only the .list-pages-box is removed instead. Nav-paragraph regex extended to /Previous|Earlier/ and the break removed so both the top and bottom 'Earlier < Current > Next' paragraphs are stripped.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: HOME page: added 'Fetch All Gig-Overview Pages' button (right of 'Fetch All Gig Pages') that fetches /YYYY-list URLs instead of /YYYY — uses the same fetchAndProcessYear pipeline with slug transformed to slug+'-list'.
HOME page: both fetch buttons and 'Stop fetching' share a single runFetch(activeBtn, slugTransform) function; 'Stop fetching' now interrupts either fetch action.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: HOME page: bb-year-header tooltip now reflects current collapse state — 'Click to collapse · Ctrl+click to collapse all' when expanded, 'Click to expand · Ctrl+click to expand all' when collapsed. Ctrl+click updates all headers' tooltips immediately.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: HOME page: year section headers (bb-year-header) are now collapsible — a ▼/▶ glyph is prepended; single-click on the header (outside the year link) toggles that year's content; Ctrl+click collapses all open sections (or expands all if all are closed). A tooltip on the header explains the shortcuts.

HOME page: added a 'Stop fetching' button next to 'Fetch All Gig Pages'. Clicking it sets a stopRequested flag that interrupts the fetch loop after the current year page finishes. The progress message reports how many pages were processed before stopping.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: HOME page: repeated year-page noise is now stripped before each bb-year-wrapper is injected — stripYearWrapperNoise() removes (1) all direct children before the first <hr> (year heading, icon legend, jump-to-recent box), (2) the '< Previous | Listing | Next >' navigation paragraph, and (3) the social-media icon div.

HOME page: buttons and progress indicator now use the same #bb-sticky-bar / #bb-controls / #bb-btn-container / #bb-year-progress / #bb-year-timer structure as YEAR pages and are rendered in a sticky bar below the site header. The page-title 'Home' heading is hidden. Old #bb-fetch-progress and #bb-fetch-timer elements and their CSS are removed.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
YEAR page: '☰ List' view was hiding the entire processedDiv, so the event title, scheduled block, icons, and descriptive text all disappeared. Fixed by inserting .bb-section-list inside processedDiv (before the first setlist element) and only toggling the visibility of the flat setlist

/

elements in place — everything else in the event block remains visible. applyMismatchFilter backward walk simplified: no special handling for .bb-section-list since it now lives inside processedDiv.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR page: each event section now has a '☰ List' toggle button alongside '⇄ Original', both wrapped in a .bb-section-controls flex container. Clicking '☰ List' converts the flat 'SONG1 / SONG2 / …' setlist into an <ol> with one <li> per song; sections with a label (e.g. 'Soundcheck:') render the label above the list. The three views (flat, original, list) are mutually exclusive; the list view is built lazily on first click via buildListDiv() and tooltip listeners are re-wired. The mismatch filter backward walk is updated to skip .bb-section-controls (was .bb-section-toggle) and to always reset .bb-section-list to hidden when encountered.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
YEAR page: extractEventAlias now requires the

…

alias to be the first element child of #wiki-tab-0-0 AND immediately followed by
as the second element child. Previously any

…

before the first
was treated as an alias, so in-page section headers like 'Willie Nile Set' (with no following
) were incorrectly shown as event aliases.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items:
YEAR page: when the first tab (#wiki-tab-0-0) of a DETAIL page opens with a

…

block before the first
, that text is treated as an event alias and rendered on the YEAR page after the validation glyph in bold italic, preceded by an em dash (e.g. '(recording) ✅ — Streets Of Minneapolis Recording Session'). Extraction via extractEventAlias(); rendered by makeAliasSpan() as .bb-event-alias.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR page: songs with a '(with Artist A, and Artist B)' guest suffix were incorrectly split by renderMatchWithConnectives — the ', and' inside the raw suffix triggered the connective check, wrapping artist names in green spans and bypassing the hyperlink path. The connective regex is now tested against the cleaned song name (item.yearSong) rather than the raw text, so the (with ...) parenthetical is already absent and the false match cannot occur.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR page: confirmed (green) song matches are now hyperlinked to their song page on brucebase using the <a href> from the DETAIL page. Single-song entries link to /song:slug; medley entries (multiple links per <li>) and plain-text entries with no song page remain as plain green spans. parseDetailSetlist now stores songUrls[] alongside songs[] in each section; diffItems carry detailSongUrl for match items, and renderSetlistElement renders <a class="bb-song-match"> instead of <span> when a URL is present.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
YEAR page: timing/scheduling blocks from DETAIL pages were only shown when the code block started with 'Scheduled:' — other patterns such as 'Local Start Time ??:?? / End Time ??:??' were silently dropped. extractScheduled() is now extractTimingBlocks() and returns all non-empty 
…
blocks; multiple blocks per event are inserted in document order below the event title.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR page: when the DETAIL page has content but no explicit <strong> section headers (e.g. Soundcheck missing on gig:1981-04-11-hallenstadion-zurich-switzerland), non-show sections now show the correct tooltip — 'Section label "Soundcheck", missing from DETAIL page' — and the implicit show section shows 'Section "show" exists on YEAR page but DETAIL page has no corresponding section label'. Previously the section label comparison produced spurious mismatch messages.

DETAIL page: when a YEAR page event has Soundcheck/Show sections but the DETAIL page has no

…

section headers at all, synthetic headers are now inserted (flagged with ⚠️) at the correct positions. The original
    /
      is split into per-section sub-lists with

      Soundcheck ⚠️

      /

      Show ⚠️

      headers inserted before each. The warning tooltip names the reason the label is missing from the original page.

parseDetailSetlist now tracks hasExplicitLabel per section (true only when a

…

header immediately preceded the list). This flag is used to distinguish implicit 'show' labels from explicitly authored section labels.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Sorry-flag tooltip rendered HTML entity literals (&#x201c; etc.) instead of plain quotes — replaced with straight ASCII quotes in dataset.msg.
Older DETAIL pages use 'Sorry no X available.' without a comma after 'Sorry' — made the comma optional in all six regex guards (/^Sorry,? no/i).

News tab label on older DETAIL pages is 'News' rather than 'News/Memorabilia': added 'News' to ICON_COVERED_TABS so no spurious extra-tab button is created; added getNewsMemTab() helper that tries 'News/Memorabilia' then 'News'; updated all four News/Memorabilia extractors (extractSetlistImages, extractTicketImages, extractNewsLinks, extractMemorabilia) to use it; similarly updated the Sorry-flag check in wireIconHandlers.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Icons whose DETAIL page tab explicitly says 'Sorry, no X available' are now flagged: a ⚠️ glyph is inserted next to the icon with a hover tooltip naming the canonical type and tab label, and the icon is dimmed (opacity 0.45). The glyph carries class bb-glyph so the Mismatches filter automatically surfaces these events. New constant CANONICAL_TAB_LABEL maps each canonical icon type to its corresponding DETAIL tab label.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: LiveDL icon: unwrap navigation <a href='/stats:…'> wrapper around the icon image in wireIconHandlers so clicks reach our panel handler instead of navigating away.
News icon (list-pages-box path): strip .gallery-box images,
Button labels: 'Mismatches Only' renamed to 'Mismatches' (all occurrences on YEAR and HOME pages). SmartTable trigger button renamed from 'Show table' / 'Hide table' to 'Table View' / 'Hide Table'.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: News icon: when the News/Memorabilia tab is populated via wikidot list-pages (gallery images, rich embedded blocks), render the full tab HTML instead of extracting only the sparse external links. Fixes events like 1977-02-07 where only the nugs.net link was shown while the full article gallery and LiveDL write-up were silently dropped.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Ticket icon: images now sourced from the News/Memorabilia tab (files:ticket-… path) instead of the Setlist tab where they do not appear.
On Stage tab: removed from SKIP_TABS so it now gets a button in the extra-tab row, appearing first (before Performances/Appearances etc.) since it is always the first YUI tab.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Extra-tab buttons: DETAIL page tabs not covered by icon images (e.g. 'Light Of Day', 'Performances', 'Appearances', 'Cancelled') are now rendered as small clickable buttons right after the icons on each YEAR-page event. Clicking a button toggles an inline panel with the tab content, using the same panel infrastructure as icon handlers. Tabs already handled by icons (Gallery, Setlist, News/Memorabilia, Media, Storyteller, Eyewitness, Recording) and the 'On Stage' meta-tab are excluded.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Video panel: extract each iframe/embed from its wikidot wrapper into a clean .bb-media-item flex child, bypassing wikidot's block/width:100% styles that were forcing embeds onto separate rows despite the flex container.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Removed display:block from .bb-icon-panel-body a — links inside prose HTML panels (Recording, Storyteller, Eyewitness) are no longer forced onto their own line.
Video (Media) panel now renders embeds side by side with flex-wrap so they flow horizontally and wrap only when the window is too narrow.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Bootleg icon now shows the full Recording tab when the <hr> does not separate a genuine LiveDL entry. A split is only performed when the tab contains a cover-image container, a nugs.net link, or 'Official concert recording' text — otherwise Bootleg renders all content regardless of <hr> separators.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Bootleg and LiveDL icons now show distinct slices of the Recording tab. When an <hr> is present it marks the boundary: LiveDL displays only the content before it (official release info + cover image); Bootleg displays only the content after it (circulating recordings). When no <hr> exists both icons show the full tab.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Icon panels are now independent: clicking an icon in one event no longer closes panels open in other events. Each panel toggles on its own and is closed individually via its ✕ button.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Full-size image viewer now correctly appears when clicking a thumbnail: _viewer is now a separate direct body child instead of a child of _lightbox, so display:none on the grid overlay no longer cascades and hides the viewer.
Setlist images are now collected only from the News/Memorabilia tab (not the Setlist tab).

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: News link source labels (e.g. NYTimes) are now rendered in italic.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Setlist images: also collect images whose filename contains 'Setlist' from the News/Memorabilia tab (not only from the Setlist tab), deduplicating by URL.
News links: append source label from trailing (Source) sibling after each news article link (e.g. 'NYTimes').

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Image thumbnails in inline panels now show a filename-derived caption below each thumbnail (e.g. 'Article 01', 'Banner 02'). Clicking a thumbnail opens the full-size image in the lightbox viewer instead of opening a new tab.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Clickable YEAR-page icons: Photo, Setlist, Ticket, News, Memorabilia, Video, Storyteller, Eyewitness, Bootleg, and LiveDL icons are now interactive. Content is extracted from the already-fetched detail page during processOneYearEvent. Photo (Gallery tab) opens a lightbox overlay with a thumbnail grid and click-to-enlarge viewer (ESC or backdrop click closes). All other icons show a collapsible inline panel below the event — one panel at a time (clicking a new icon closes any previously open panel). Title variants (e.g. 'Photos', 'Eye', 'Audio', 'Official Live Download') are normalised via ICON_TITLE_MAP. Icons with no extractable content are left non-interactive.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items:
YEAR page: show the 'Scheduled:' timing block from each detail page below the event title. The block (a 
Scheduled: …
on the detail page) is extracted via extractScheduled() and rendered as a small monospace .bb-scheduled div inserted after the event title paragraph.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Event count mismatch: '⚡ All Events (N)' now uses events.length (actual processed events) instead of sections.length. The page's trailing navigation and footer sections are also wrapped as .bb-section-processed by wrapYearSections (they sit between <hr> tags) but are not events, causing sections.length to overcount by 2 on pages like /1973.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: SmartTable sticky stacking: passes stickyOffset: 'calc(var(--bb-header-h) + var(--bb-sticky-bar-h))' to SmartTable.render() so st-global-bar and st-thead pin below #bb-sticky-bar while scrolling through the rendered table. setupStickyBar() now measures and stores --bb-sticky-bar-h immediately after building the bar. Sticky offsets survive sort/filter rerenders via SmartTable's cached _theadStickyTop mechanism (added in smarttable v1.2.1).

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: SmartTable integration: adds an optional 'Show table' trigger button to the YEAR page button bar via @require of dist/smarttable.js and adapters/brucebase.js. BrucebaseAdapter.extract() is called before wrapYearSections() to avoid the DOM mutation that breaks _splitOnHr. The SmartTable host div (#bb-smarttable-host) is inserted before #page-content so the rendered table appears between the sticky bar and the event list. Degrades gracefully if the @require files are absent.
Layout: #bb-btn-container and #bb-year-progress are now wrapped in #bb-controls (display:flex) so the button bar and progress timer appear on one horizontal row, reducing the sticky-bar height.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Anchor consistency check: on YEAR pages, after fetching each detail page, compares the <a name> anchor (e.g. '170126') with the fragment used in the detail page's 'Info & Setlist' back-link (e.g. /2026#170126). A ⚠️ span with hover tooltip is inserted right after the mismatched <a name> element. On DETAIL pages, the same check runs in reverse — the preceding YEAR page anchor is looked up and compared against the 'Info & Setlist' link fragment; a ⚠️ is appended after the link on mismatch. Anchor mismatches are also caught by the ⚡ Mismatches Only filter.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: annotateSetlistTab: ⚠️ was inserted as a separate after the , causing a line-break between 'Setlist' and the symbol. Now appended directly inside the as a text node, producing Setlist ⚠️.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: annotateSetlistTab: was searching li[title="active"] (only the currently selected tab), so the annotation was invisible when the script ran. Now finds the <em> element whose text is exactly 'Setlist' regardless of tab selection state. Also switched from a CSS class to inline style (color/font-weight) to override wikidot's tab CSS specificity.

setupMismatchFilter: mismatch and total-event counts are now computed once (after all processing) and embedded in the button labels — '⚡ Mismatches Only (N)' when showing all events, '⚡ All Events (M)' when the filter is active.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: DETAIL page: the active 'Setlist' tab (<li title="active">) is now annotated after processing — bold green when the event name and full setlist match, or with a ⚠️ suffix when any name or setlist mismatch is detected.

YEAR page: the ⇄ Original toggle button for each event section now appears immediately after that event finishes processing rather than waiting until all events are done. processYearEvents() accepts a sections array and calls insertSectionToggle() per event inside the async batch map.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: parseYearSetlist prose token filter: relax from 'any lowercase letter' to '2+ consecutive lowercase letters'. Songs like 'MRS. McGRATH' contain a single isolated lowercase letter (the 'c' in the Scottish Mc prefix) that is not prose. Real prose tokens (e.g. 'Show length is 3:07.', 'Concert noted in...') always contain runs of 2+ consecutive lowercase characters in normal English words, so the tighter threshold correctly rejects prose while preserving mixed-case proper nouns.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
parseDetailSetlist: recognise section-label paragraphs of the form '

Pre-show (solo acoustic)

' where supplementary text lives in a rather than directly in the . The old condition required the full

text to equal the text exactly; the new branch accepts

elements whose child nodes are only STRONG, SPAN, or whitespace, and uses the full text content ('Pre-show (solo acoustic)') as the label — matching the YEAR-page label 'Pre-show (solo acoustic):' exactly.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: extractYearPageEvents now skips event-URL links whose text does not start with YYYY-MM-DD. Prose links inside event notes (e.g. '1993 speech') were incorrectly collected as event headings and annotated with a (gig) ❌ glyph. Event heading links always start with the date, so the date-prefix check reliably excludes prose links.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: normalizeDetailName: article rewrite now handles (The)/(Le)/(De) appearing mid-string (e.g. 'Spotify HQ, Adelphi (The), London'). The old anchored regex moved the article to the very front of the whole venue string; the new in-place replacement moves each article to precede only its own venue name, so 'Spotify HQ, Adelphi (The), London, England' correctly normalises to 'SPOTIFY HQ, THE ADELPHI, LONDON, ENGLAND'.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR-page tokens like 'DON'T BACK DOWN, DON'T BACK DOWN ON OUR LOVE, and/or BLACK MOUNTAIN BALLAD' were incorrectly excluded from setlist comparison (filtered as prose due to lowercase 'and/or') or rendered as mismatches. A new songCompareKey() function detects ', and/or' / ', and' / ', or' connectives and normalises the token to 'SONG A - SONG B - SONG C' for comparison against DETAIL pages (which join multi-link <li> entries with ' - '). On a successful match the connective text is kept verbatim and the individual song names are rendered in match-green while the separators stay in the original page colour.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Mismatched space characters in char-diff names are now rendered as a light-blue pill (.bb-char-diff-space, background #b0c8ff) so extra or missing spaces are immediately visible rather than invisible against the red background.

sections.label: 🔧 Refactor
items: Reverted v1.37 multi-space collapsing in normalizeDetailName: whitespace differences are now shown explicitly in the char-diff view instead of being silently hidden.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: normalizeDetailName collapsed runs of multiple spaces to a single space. Reverted in v1.38 in favour of explicit whitespace highlighting.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Mismatched characters in char-diff song names now get a light red background (#ffe0e0) in addition to bold red text, making single-character differences like '.' easy to spot.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Prose notes containing a time value (e.g. 'Show length is 3:07.') were incorrectly parsed as setlist songs, causing the numeric part after the colon ('07') to be flagged as 'Only on YEAR page'. Fixed in three places: (1) the prose filter in collectSetlistElements no longer strips label prefixes whose text ends in a digit (so 'Show length is 3:07.' is no longer accidentally stripped to '07.' before the lowercase check); (2) parseYearSetlist's section-label regex now requires the character before the colon to not be a digit, preventing '3' from being treated as a section label; (3) song tokens that still contain lowercase letters after cleanSongName are discarded, since all real song names on brucebase are in ALL CAPS.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Rename tooltip result label for same-day show variants from 'Show variant ⚠️' to 'Event variant on same day ⚠️'.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Extend show-variant soft-mismatch (⚠️ instead of ❌) to cover '(Afternoon)' and '(Evening)' suffixes in addition to '(Early)' and '(Late)'. Tooltip result row updated to generic 'Show variant ⚠️'.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: DETAIL pages: runDetailPage() was returning early when no setlist was found, preventing the event-type tag and name-comparison glyph from being added to #page-title. Now always runs the name check; skips only the setlist-diff step when the detail page has no setlist.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: YEAR pages: render event type (e.g. '(gig)') in italics after each event name link, before the comparison glyph. Applies to all event types including unknown (❓) and fetch-error (⚠️) cases.
DETAIL pages: render event type in a smaller italic font inside the page title heading, followed by the name-comparison glyph (✅/⚠️/❌). Hover shows the same tooltip as on YEAR pages.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR and DETAIL pages: event names that differ only by an '(Early)' or '(Late)' suffix on the DETAIL page now show ⚠️ instead of ❌, with an amber 'Early/Late variant' result row in the tooltip.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR pages: remove max-height/overflow-y/scrollbar-gutter from #side-bar — these caused the sidebar to be permanently narrower than wikidot intended, breaking year-link lines. Sticky positioning works without internal scrolling.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR pages: add scrollbar-gutter:stable to #side-bar so the scrollbar reserves space before appearing, preventing sidebar content from narrowing and breaking year-link lines.

YEAR pages: remove
elements from #bb-pre-events (the sticky header band) to eliminate wasted vertical space from the large year heading.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR pages: progress timer moved to front of indicator string in fixed-width MM:SS format (e.g. '00:01 ... Processing event "001 / 47: …"'); event counter zero-padded to 3 digits.

YEAR pages: sticky header band (#bb-sticky-bar) groups page title, button container, progress indicator, and pre-event content (icon legend, year heading) in a band pinned below #header while scrolling through events.
All pages: #header is now sticky (top:0) so site navigation stays visible on scroll. #side-bar is sticky below the header with overflow scroll for tall sidebars.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR pages: group the global toggle and mismatch filter buttons into a shared #bb-btn-container div. Both buttons are rendered immediately when the script starts but remain disabled (greyed out) until all events finish processing.

YEAR pages: add a live processing indicator below the button container showing 'Processing event "N - <title>" / <total> … <elapsed>' with a running timer. After processing the message switches to 'Done — N events processed in m:ss'.
YEAR pages: hide the wikidot-injected 'Jump to most recent show/event' list-pages-box at the top of the page — it is not useful when the script renders its own UI.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fix false-positive section-label mismatch flag on YEAR pages for 'recording' sections: recording sessions on YEAR pages (<blockquote>) always appear as part of 'show' on DETAIL pages, so their section label should never be compared.

Switch section-label comparison from case-insensitive to case-sensitive (except for the implicit 'show'/'show' pairing) so capitalisation differences like 'with Willie Nile' (YEAR) vs 'With Willie Nile' (DETAIL) are correctly flagged on both YEAR and DETAIL pages.
Extend event-name article rewrite in normalizeDetailName to also handle '(De)' in addition to '(The)' and '(Le)'.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add 'Fetch All Gig Pages' button on the brucebase home page (brucebase.wikidot.com/). When pressed, iterates over every year page listed in the 'Gig Pages' navigation block (1949-64, 1965–2026), fetches each one, runs the full consistency-check pipeline (event-name ✅/❌ glyphs and setlist colour-coding), and renders the accumulated results below the button. A companion '⚡ Mismatches Only' filter button hides clean events across all years simultaneously. Extended @include to match the home page URL (/start or empty path). Refactored extractYearPageEvents() to accept a content element parameter so the same function works on both the live YEAR page DOM and injected year content on the home page.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Support the consolidated 1949-64 YEAR page (brucebase.wikidot.com/1949-64). Extended @include regex to match it, added it to the isYearPage check, and added yearPageSlug() so DETAIL pages for events in 1949–1964 correctly fetch 1949-64 instead of a non-existent per-year page.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Fix '⚡ Mismatches Only' filter having no effect: anchors on YEAR pages are inside

elements, not direct children of .bb-section-processed, so the anchor-based splitting loop never fired. Rewrote applyMismatchFilter to treat each .bb-section-processed div as one event block (which it is, since every event is separated by its own

), and to also hide/restore the preceding
and section-toggle button so orphaned separators don't remain visible.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add '⚡ Mismatches Only' filter toggle on YEAR pages (placed after the global toggle, after #page-title). When active, hides all event blocks that have no name mismatch (❌), no setlist discrepancy (year-only/detail-only/char-diff), and no warning symbol (⚠️/❓). Pressing again restores all events.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Render match/mismatch colours on DETAIL pages where songs are in

elements (not

  • ): renderDetailSetlist now collects

    song elements as a fallback when no

  • exist, and inserts year-only entries as

    nodes to match the surrounding format.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items:
Flag songs that use the unusual paragraph format (

) with a ⚠️ warning symbol on both YEAR and DETAIL pages. Hovering the symbol shows a tooltip explaining the structural anomaly.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Parse setlists on old detail pages (e.g. 1974 gigs) where songs are listed as bare

elements rather than inside

    /
      . parseDetailSetlist now collects song links from

      children and emits them as a section alongside the existing OL/UL path.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Parse setlists on old detail pages where the <ol>/<ul> is nested inside a <div> within #page-content rather than being a direct child. parseDetailSetlist now widens its element search to td.querySelectorAll('ol, ul') when no lists appear as direct children of the container.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fall back to #page-content as the setlist container for very old detail pages (e.g. 1974 gigs) that have no #wiki-tab-0-1 tab widget. Previously these pages logged 'No setlist found' and skipped comparison entirely.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Skip

and

elements that are nested inside a when collecting YEAR page setlist elements. Release/news announcement boxes (e.g. the /retail:the-essential box after 2003#081103) use
containers and their all-caps headings were passing the prose filter and being treated as setlist songs.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Apply green match colour on DETAIL pages for plain-text <li> entries that have no /song: link (e.g. REFRIGERATOR BLUES). styleDetailLi now falls back to adding bb-song-match to the <li> itself when no song links are found, instead of silently doing nothing.

sections.label: 🔧 Refactor
items: Add detailed console logging in runDetailPage: matched event link text and href, next anchor name, number of collected setlist elements, year and detail song arrays, and per-item diff results.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fix 'No matching event link found' on all DETAIL pages. The path variable strips the leading slash (location.pathname.replace(/^\//, '')), so the href match '/' + path is required to compare against YEAR page anchors whose href attributes start with '/'.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fix DETAIL page setlist comparison failing when the YEAR page anchor carries a letter suffix (e.g. '150571a') that is absent from the DETAIL page URL. Previously runDetailPage derived the anchor from the URL, which could not reproduce the suffix, causing the anchor lookup to fail and the comparison to be silently skipped. Fix: locate the event link on the YEAR page by matching its href against the current page path directly, then read the next <a name> boundary from that link — eliminating any dependence on the anchor name.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Support DETAIL pages whose setlist is placed directly inside #wiki-tab-0-1 with no wrapping <table>/<td> (e.g. early-era gig pages). Add getSetlistContainer() helper that falls back from '#wiki-tab-0-1 td' to '#wiki-tab-0-1' itself; use it in parseDetailSetlist, renderDetailSetlist, insertDetailToggle, and the runDetailPage snapshot.

Preserve letter suffixes (a, b, …) in YEAR-page anchor names derived from DETAIL page URLs. URLs like 'gig:1968-05-00a-…' now produce anchor '000568a' instead of '000568', correctly identifying multi-event days with unknown or zero day numbers.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Extend DETAIL-page name normalisation to handle the French article '(Le)' in addition to '(The)'. A DETAIL name like '1967-12-27 Teendezvous (Le), New Shrewsbury, NJ' is now rewritten to '1967-12-27 - LE TEENDEZVOUS, NEW SHREWSBURY, NJ' and correctly matches the YEAR page entry.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Preserve original label case on YEAR pages. Previously the label prefix (e.g. 'With Garland Jeffreys:') was stored as all-lowercase and then only the first character was re-capitalised on render, producing 'With garland jeffreys:'. Fix: store the raw label text as-is and use case-insensitive comparisons for the 'show'/'recording'/'soundcheck' special cases.

Ignore footnote nodes (e.g. 'Setlist incomplete and may be inaccurate.') when parsing YEAR page setlists. Previously el.textContent included the footnote text, causing its lowercase letters to trigger the prose-rejection filter and silently drop the setlist entry. Fix: a new textWithoutSup() helper strips children before extracting text for both the prose filter and song-name parsing. The footnote HTML is re-appended after
when renderSetlistElement rewrites the element, so it remains visible in the processed view.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: On DETAIL pages, apply the match colour only to song <a> links (by adding bb-song-match directly to each a[href^='/song:'] inside the <li>), not to the <li> element itself. Previously, adding bb-song-match to the <li> caused the general .bb-song-match { color: #2a2 } CSS rule to make the entire list item green, including descriptive <span> nodes such as '(parts)'.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Strip generic lowercase descriptive parentheticals — such as '(parts)', '(acoustic)', '(instrumental)' — from song names before comparison, so YEAR page entries like 'LONESOME DAY (parts)' correctly match DETAIL page entries 'LONESOME DAY'. Previously only '(with …)' and '(xN)' were stripped; the same single regex now covers all parentheticals that contain at least one lowercase letter, preserving all-caps song-name qualifiers like '(41 SHOTS)' and '(COME OUT TONIGHT)'.
On YEAR pages, render only the core song name inside the green bb-song-match span; any trailing qualifier such as '(parts)' is appended as plain uncoloured text outside the span.

On DETAIL pages, apply match colour only to the <a> link inside a matched <li> (li.bb-song-match a), not to the entire <li>. This prevents descriptive <span> nodes such as '(parts)' from inheriting the green colour.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Recognise hyphenated and lowercase label prefixes on YEAR page setlist entries (e.g. 'Pre-show: SONG', 'with Willie Nile: SONG'). The previous label-strip regex /^[A-Z][a-z]+\w*:/ required a single PascalCase word and failed on hyphens or lowercase-starting labels, causing those entries to be discarded as prose. Changed to /^[^/:\n]+:/ (anything up to the first colon) in both collectSetlistElements and parseYearSetlist.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Reject prose

elements that embed quoted lyrics with '/' as line-breaks (e.g. show-notes paragraphs). Previously any

containing ' / ' was accepted as a setlist. Fix: examine only the text before the first ' / ' (the first would-be song name), strip label prefix and qualifiers, and reject if lowercase letters remain. Genuine setlist entries always start with an all-caps song name; prose sentences have lowercase before the first slash.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Recognise single-song setlist entries on YEAR pages. The previous ' / ' separator check incorrectly treated all-caps single-song

elements (e.g. 'DANCING IN THE DARK') as prose. Replacement heuristic: strip any 'Label:' prefix and '(with …)'/'(xN)' qualifiers, then accept the

if no lowercase letters remain — prose always contains lowercase, brucebase song names are all-caps.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Skip

elements nested inside a

in collectSetlistElements. querySelectorAll('p, blockquote') returns both the
and its inner

; when the

contains a ' / ' separator it passed the prose filter and was counted twice, doubling every recording-session song in yearFlat and producing spurious year-only mismatches.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Stop collecting setlist elements when an inline event date header (

starting with YYYY-MM-DD - ) is encountered. Previously, events without their own named anchor (e.g. recording sessions listed inline on the year page) caused collectSetlistElements to sweep up setlists from dozens of subsequent unrelated events.

Fall back to plain <li> text when parsing detail-page setlists for songs that have no dedicated /song: page link. Previously such songs (e.g. REFRIGERATOR BLUES) were silently dropped, causing an empty detailSections result, an early return, and a missing toggle button. Venue/date entries (YYYY-MM-DD prefix) are excluded from the fallback.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add toggle button on DETAIL pages (after #page-title) to switch the active setlist tab between the original unprocessed content and the userscript-processed diff view. Uses show/hide on wrapper divs inside the setlist td rather than replacing #page-content, so wikidot tab-switching and all tooltip event listeners remain functional.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add setlist/recording session comparison between YEAR and DETAIL pages using LCS diff with Levenshtein char-diff reclassification for near-misses.

Parse YEAR page inline setlists (

/

) per-event using anchor boundaries.

Parse DETAIL page setlists from #wiki-tab-0-1
    /
      with section labels from

      headers.
Colour-code setlist diffs: green (match), light-blue (year-only), yellow (detail-only), red (char-diff).
Rich hover tooltips on non-matching songs via showSongTooltip.
DETAIL page mode: style existing <li>s and insert missing year-only songs inline.
Extend @include to match DETAIL pages (gig/nogig/recording/interview/offstage/onstage/rehearsal/soundcheck).
Add page-level global toggle button (after #page-title) to switch entire #page-content between original and processed view.
Add per-section toggle buttons (after each <hr>) to flip individual year-page sections between original and processed state.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Ignore prose description

s when collecting setlist elements — only

elements containing the ' / ' song-list delimiter qualify;

containers are always included.
Fix global toggle blank screen: use explicit 'block'/'none' values instead of clearing inline style, which left the CSS hide rule in effect.

Fix per-section toggle no visual effect: serialise original HTML as a plain string in wrapYearSections and only create the originalDiv node inside insertSectionToggle (after processing), preventing extractYearPageEvents from finding cloned <a> links and producing duplicate diffs.

sections.label: 🔧 Refactor
items: Rename script from brucebase-eventcheck.user.js to BruceBaseParser.user.js and reorganise repository layout.
Add new CSS classes: .bb-song-{match,year-only,detail-only,char-diff}, .bb-char-{match,diff}, .bb-sep, .bb-section-label, .bb-toggle-btn.

sections.label: 📝 Docs
items: Rewrite CLAUDE.md with full v1.3/v1.4 architecture documentation covering all three page modes, processing pipeline, LCS diff algorithm, colour-coding scheme, anchor format, name normalisation rules, and shared utility functions.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add support for YYYY-list pages: fetch the corresponding YEAR page once, build an anchor→name map, and compare each list event name (after stripping optional subtitle suffix) against the YEAR page entry.
Collect sibling text nodes after the <a> tag so suffixes like '(Golden Globe Awards)' are included in raw name capture.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Tooltip box now auto-sizes to content with no line-wrapping.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Initial release of BruceBase event name checker userscript.
Validates event name consistency between YEAR overview pages and their DETAIL pages.
Flags matches (✅), mismatches (❌), unknown event types (❓), and fetch failures (⚠️) with inline glyphs and rich diff tooltips.
Supports all known event types: gig, interview, nogig, offstage, onstage, recording, rehearsal, soundcheck.
Name normalisation: moves '(The)' suffix before comma to front, inserts ' - ' after date, uppercases for comparison.
Token-level diff displayed in hover tooltips via buildDiffHtml.
